ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "session_year" TEXT /* Year of the session */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the session is held */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the party of the session's leadership */,
  "leadership_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the leadership during the session */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the session */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., regular, special) */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_leadership_id FOREIGN KEY ("leadership_id") REFERENCES leadership ("leadership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "district_number" INTEGER /* Number assigned to the district */,
  "district_population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "district_area" REAL /* Area of the district in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committees" (
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session during which the committee was formed */,
  "committee_name" TEXT /* Name of the committee */,
  "chairperson" TEXT /* Chairperson of the committee */,
  "committee_description" TEXT /* Description of the committee's purpose and responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committees_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the political party */,
  "party_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the party name */,
  "party_description" TEXT /* Description of the party's platform and values */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leadership" (
  "leadership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leadership role */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session where the leadership exists */,
  "leadership_title" TEXT /* Title of the leadership role (e.g., Speaker, Majority Leader) */,
  "leader_name" TEXT /* Name of the leader */,
  "leadership_description" TEXT /* Description of the leadership role and responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leadership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leadership_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_committee_relationship" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the relationship */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the committee */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., parent, child) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_committee_relationship_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_committee_relationship_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, public, government official) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the information */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the information was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detail */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session to which the detail belongs */,
  "detail_description" TEXT /* Description of the detail */,
  "detail_category" TEXT /* Category of the detail (e.g., bills, resolutions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_details_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session that had changes */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_history_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committee_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the committee to which the member belongs */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Name of the member */,
  "member_title" TEXT /* Title of the member (e.g., chair, vice chair) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committee_members_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bills" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session during which the bill was introduced */,
  "bill_name" TEXT /* Name of the bill */,
  "bill_description" TEXT /* Description of the bill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bills_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bill being voted on */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the member casting the vote */,
  "vote_cast" TEXT /* Vote cast by the member (e.g., yes, no, abstain) */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date when the vote was cast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES committee_members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resolutions" (
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resolution */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session during which the resolution was introduced */,
  "resolution_name" TEXT /* Name of the resolution */,
  "resolution_description" TEXT /* Description of the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resolutions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)
